metadata.title: Trust & Security | inovy
metadata.description: Learn how Inovy protects your data with EU-only infrastructure, AES-256 encryption, GDPR compliance, and enterprise-grade security measures.

hero.title: Trusted by Dutch Organizations
hero.subtitle: Enterprise-grade security and privacy for your meeting intelligence
hero.description: Inovy is built from the ground up with Dutch and European compliance requirements in mind. Your data stays in the EU, protected by industry-leading security measures.

dataResidency.title: EU-Only Data Residency
dataResidency.description: All your data is processed and stored exclusively within European Union data centers. No exceptions.

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.description: Your data is protected with military-grade encryption at every stage of its lifecycle.

atRest.title: At Rest
atRest.description: All stored data is encrypted using AES-256, the same standard used by governments and financial institutions worldwide.

inTransit.title: In Transit
inTransit.description: All network communication is secured with TLS 1.3, ensuring the highest level of transport security.

avgCompliance.title: GDPR Compliance
avgCompliance.description: Inovy is designed for full compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR/AVG).

consent.title: Consent Tracking
consent.description: Granular consent management for recording and data processing, with full audit trails.

piiRedaction.title: PII Redaction
piiRedaction.description: Automatic detection and redaction of personally identifiable information from transcripts and summaries.

auditLogging.title: Audit Logging
auditLogging.description: Tamper-proof audit logs with cryptographic hash chains, ensuring complete traceability of all data operations.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.description: Configurable retention policies with automatic cleanup, so data is never kept longer than necessary.

subProcessors.title: Sub-Processors
subProcessors.description: Full transparency about every third party that processes data on our behalf.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.description: We are committed to meeting the highest industry standards for security and compliance.

soc2.title: SOC 2 Type II
soc2.description: Independent audit of our security, availability, and confidentiality controls. Target completion: Q4 2026.

piiHandling.title: PII Handling
piiHandling.description: Intelligent protection for sensitive personal data across all meeting content.

detection.title: Automatic Detection
detection.description: Our AI automatically identifies personally identifiable information — names, phone numbers, BSN numbers, email addresses, and more — in transcripts and summaries.

redaction.title: Smart Redaction
redaction.description: Detected PII can be automatically redacted or masked based on your organization's policies, while preserving the usefulness of the content.

incidentResponse.title: Incident Response
incidentResponse.description: Transparent and swift action when security matters most.
incidentResponse.commitmentDescription: In the unlikely event of a data breach, we commit to notifying all affected organizations within 48 hours — well within the GDPR's 72-hour requirement. Our incident response plan includes immediate containment, thorough investigation, and clear communication.

download.title: Documentation
download.description: Access our complete security and compliance documentation.
download.dpaDescription: Our DPA covers all aspects of data processing, sub-processors, security measures, and your rights as a data controller.
download.loginRequired: Sign in required to access the DPA portal.
